name: gazette
title: Gazette
description: A modern digital newsroom theme for local papers and topical magazines. The signature is the front page: a CSS-grid hierarchy that lets twelve stories breathe — one lead, a tier of secondaries, and a compact brief list — under bold sans headlines, a serif reading column, and a press-blue masthead rule.

tokens.--font-serif: story body text — the reading face
tokens.--text-masthead: the paper's name in the masthead
tokens.--tracking-kicker: letter-spacing of uppercase kickers and nav
tokens.--weight-headline: headline weight — the newsroom's bold voice
tokens.--color-accent: press blue — kickers, links, the masthead rule
tokens.--page-max: maximum width of the front page and masthead
tokens.--measure: maximum width of the story reading column
tokens.--masthead-rule: thickness of the accent rule under the paper's name
tokens.--radius: corner rounding on images and code blocks
